data.llm_base_url: Local LLM base URL — for Ollama use host homeassistant.local, port 11434, path /v1

error.need_llm: Enter either a cloud API key or a local LLM URL.

abort.import_failed: Found a JARVIS config but no usable LLM (no API key and no local endpoint).

init.title: JARVIS — Core
init.description: Step 1 of 4: persona, directive, and conversation model.

data.use_hass_api: Enable home control (lights, climate, locks, etc.)

routing.title: JARVIS — Routing
routing.description: Step 2 of 4: bedroom areas (for sleep detection), broadcast media_player group, and your phone notify service.

data.bedroom_areas: Bedroom areas (for sleep detection during quiet hours)
data.broadcast_group: Broadcast speaker group (typically your home Cast group)

observer.title: JARVIS — Observer Mode
observer.description: Step 3 of 4: proactive awareness. Requires a Gemini API key.

identity.title: JARVIS — Identity
identity.description: Step 4 of 4: per-person recognition. Works without special hardware; voice fingerprinting needs a local GPU and is off by default.

data.identity_min_confidence: Minimum confidence before committing to a person
data.voice_recognition_source: Voice recognition source (entity from a speaker-recognition service, e.g. binary_sensor.*_voice)
data.voice_recognition_auto_enroll: Auto-flag voices to enroll as people speak
